confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: Route all queries to BASELINE; no certified SLM region.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: Route all queries to BASELINE; no certified SLM region.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.4511; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.4511 < score < 0.4527; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.4511; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.4511 < score < 0.4527; BASELINE otherwise.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.3520; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.3520 < score < 0.3878; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.3520; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.3520 < score < 0.3878; BASELINE otherwise.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.0019; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.0019 < score < 0.0219; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.0019; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.0019 < score < 0.0219; BASELINE otherwise.
